title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2 and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders or tool-wielding agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI): themes, multi-user, code highlighting, RAG.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Conversational TUI for Ollama built with Python Prompt-Toolkit; supports models, sessions, syntax highlight.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair-programmer.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs plus Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull and manage models from Ruby or Rails apps.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean Next.js chat interface for Ollama with TailwindCSS, dark mode and markdown support.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: Collection of GitHub Actions to pull, cache and serve Ollama models in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from notes for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-curl-examples
summary: Curated one-liners and scripts showing how to use the Ollama REST API with curl/jq for quick hacks.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, Postgres vector DB and Redis for RAG.

title: ollama-npm-package
summary: Official NPM package providing TypeScript-first client for Ollama; same feature set as Python SDK.

title: ollama-pypi-package
summary: Official PyPI package: lightweight Python client auto-generated from the OpenAPI spec.

title: ollama-reddit-community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, integrations and feature requests around Ollama.

title: ollama-hackernews-launch
summary: Hacker News discussion on Ollama launch highlighting ease of use, MIT license and local GPU offloading.
